task: Validate + normalize a provider NPI lookup. Input: { npi, resolver?: 'nppes_v2'|'tenant_master' }. Output: { npi, valid_checksum: boolean, entity_type: 'individual'|'organization', resolver_used, record?: { name, addresses[], taxonomy_codes[], identifiers[] } }. Checksum is Luhn-mod-10 with a constant prefix 80840 prepended (per CMS NPI specification). NPPES schema fields normalized to a single shape regardless of resolver.

recipes.name: npi-directory
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var i=input||{},r=(lib&&lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules)||{};var P=String(r.npi_prefix_for_luhn||'80840');var E=r.entity_type_codes||{'1':'individual','2':'organization'};var npi=String(i.npi||'').replace(/\D/g,'');var resolver=String(i.resolver||'nppes_v2');var ok=false;if(/^\d{10}$/.test(npi)){var s=P+npi,sum=0,L=s.length;for(var k=0;k<L;k++){var d=s.charCodeAt(L-1-k)-48;if(k%2===1){d=d*2;if(d>9)d=d-9;}sum=sum+d;}ok=(sum%10===0);}var et=null;if(i.entity_type_code!=null){var c=String(i.entity_type_code);if(E[c])et=E[c];}else if(ok){et=(npi.charAt(0)==='1'||npi.charAt(0)==='2'||npi.charAt(0)==='3')?'individual':'organization';}var out={npi:npi,valid_checksum:ok,entity_type:et,resolver_used:resolver};if(i.record&&typeof i.record==='object'){out.record={name:i.record.name||null,addresses:Array.isArray(i.record.addresses)?i.record.addresses:[],taxonomy_codes:Array.isArray(i.record.taxonomy_codes)?i.record.taxonomy_codes:[],identifiers:Array.isArray(i.record.identifiers)?i.record.identifiers:[]};}return out;}

pack.description: NPI Luhn-mod-10 checksum with the CMS-pinned 80840 prefix, the NPPES v2 entity-type code map, the NPPES public API endpoint, and the NUCC taxonomy root for taxonomy-code normalization.
